The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
We are creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
If you would like to support our efforts, donations can be sent to intergalacticherald.sol
Star Atlas : The New Showroom with COMBAT!
Beyond the Horizon posted a video about the new Star Atlas Showroom.
An Unreal Update — Star Atlas Launches the Last Patch before Ground Breaking Showroom R2.2 Release.
Star Atlas published an article announcing a new update for the Showroom game.
Star Atlas: Checkpoint #2
A video roundtable discussion about the past year in Star Atlas.
Project Galia – A Star Atlas Experiment
Star Atlas leaked an internal video of future Star Atlas gameplay.
Metaverse Nomads #126 Star Atlas Faction Fleet Earnings Reduced w/ Signal
Metaverse Nomads posted a video replay of their Star Atlas livestream.
Star Atlas And The Future Of The Metaverse!
Beyond the Horizon posted a video documentary about the metaverse.
WEEKLY STAR ATLAS NEWSLETTER #111
Aephia published their weekly Star Atlas newsletter.
STAR ATLAS #216 The Worst Gamer Ever.
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video with Star Atlas updates.
